decisions.decision: Use `backend/server.py`'s `ACCOUNT_SERVICE_INDEX_ROUTES` tuple as the only production seam for this child step and insert `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` immediately after `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure`, preserving the existing bare-path route string format.
alternatives_rejected: Advertise the new account route with an HTTP-method prefix instead of the existing bare-path format.
Append `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` in a different spot or sort the account routes independently of the frozen contract order.
Introduce a second route list for the root service index instead of extending the existing tuple.

decisions.decision: Keep the service-index change strictly additive so `/v1/accounts/{id}/risk` and `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` remain advertised unchanged and in place while `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` is added beside them.
alternatives_rejected: Replace `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` with `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` in this child step.
Reorder the existing account routes as part of introducing the new endpoint.

decisions.decision: Keep this child plan scoped to the service-index contract seam and boundary-check the frozen root discovery assertion, while leaving the formal `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` regression update to the later backend-regression phase already assigned in the parent plan.
alternatives_rejected: Expand this child step to own the deferred backend regression work.
Ignore the existing exact `routes.accounts` assertion even though it freezes the observable contract.

steps.task: Update `ACCOUNT_SERVICE_INDEX_ROUTES` in `backend/server.py` so the ordered account route tuple becomes `/risk`, `/exposure`, then `/positions`, with `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` inserted immediately after `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure`.

Verify the root service index continues to emit `routes.accounts` directly from `list(ACCOUNT_SERVICE_INDEX_ROUTES)` so the observable payload changes only by the new additive trailing entry in the frozen account-route order.

Review the existing root discovery assertion in `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` against the new contract and keep this child explicitly scoped to the service-index implementation seam, with the assertion update deferred to the later consolidated backend-regression step.
